name: H: Multi-turn adversarial — pressure rises, suspicion evolves

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: I mean, I was going to, but then the server thing came up.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That's not what I asked. Did you send it or not?

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: Well, not exactly, but I basically had it ready. It just needs a couple tweaks.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Stop dodging. Answer the question directly.

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: I'm not dodging! I just want to make sure it's solid before I send it, that's all.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: You always do this. You're avoiding the question again.

turns.speaker: target
turns.text: Look, I'll try to get it out by end of day. Probably. Unless something comes up.

assertions.note: pressure should generally rise across turns
